text:
It was a bright Saturday afternoon. Linda loves long walks.

So Linda walked.

She walked alone.

She walked slowly.

And every time she paused she saw something interesting.

One day she saw a cat chasing its own tail, happily.

Another day she saw someone reading a large book.

That person turnedAround.

"I've always wanted that."

You wanted something?

You walked.

That day Linda didn't just walk.

She danced.

A ballet dancer.

A tall dancer.

She loved their limbs.

That's why.

She loved long walks.

Even better.


That's Life.




You don't enjoy them.

Just hate them.



That's boring.



You're happy just thinking about them.



That's right.



You talk.

You laugh.


You can't hear yourself.


That's because.



You believe you hear.


You think.




You just hear a voice.



It likes you.



That's life.



You know?




You know you don't.


Just laugh with it.



That's life.



We don
